bugs.description: The `// ENG-2417: slice 2 of the retry plan` comment carries an internal ticket ID plus a plan/slice marker. Per Comment Discipline this is mechanical, judgment-free, and rots — a blocking finding on first occurrence.
The `// multiply the base delay by two to the power of the attempt number` comment restates the adjacent line instead of explaining a non-obvious why.
Three commented-out dead lines inside nextRetryDelayMs. Version control remembers deleted code; the block only sows doubt.

non_violations.description: PAY-9310 appears inside a thrown error message string literal, not a comment — ticket-like tokens outside comment syntax are not violations.
The normalizeHeaders workaround comment links the upstream node-fetch bug — the link IS the why, so it is exempt from the reference ban.
backoffSchedule is a comment-free clean function — a region with zero comments passes trivially; never manufacture a finding.
